ESRD beneficiaries, CMS uses risk models that distinguish between beneficiaries on dialysis and beneficiaries that are post-
transplant. These models have similar structures to the non-ESRD models and CMS calibrates to have an average risk score of 
1.0 for these subpopulations. The CMS annual MA Rate Announcements document the applicable models for a payment year.8
